changelogs:
Updated to 2.0.7

Added:

Launcher settings
- Roblox Bootstrapper: (Similar to Fishstrap/Bloxstrap) automatically downloads the version you select (Latest/Downgrade)
- Exploit Sync: Automatically fetches the version your exploit supports each launch and auto upgrades or downgrades (Doesn't support Volt)
- Use Roblox CDN option

Advanced settings
- Open Roblox installation folder
- Versions folder selected for bootstrapper
